description: ARGODREIGN baseline safety rulepack for Sprint 1

rules.title: NH3 leak concentration above area limit
rules.recommendation: Trigger emergency response and isolate leak source immediately.
rules.reference: Factory Act safety controls + plant emergency protocol

rules.title: Compressor vibration exceeds critical band
rules.recommendation: Reduce load and inspect alignment/bearing condition.

rules.title: Pump vibration trend above warning band
rules.recommendation: Plan inspection within shift and verify coupling health.

rules.title: Bearing temperature elevated
rules.recommendation: Check lubrication and cooling before continued high-load operation.

rules.title: Reformer section over-temperature
rules.recommendation: Initiate burner and feed checks per emergency SOP.

rules.title: HP reactor temperature outside envelope
rules.recommendation: Escalate to panel operator and verify process condition immediately.

rules.title: Instrument air train pressure collapse risk
rules.recommendation: Confirm compressor support systems and switch to standby line.

rules.title: Power factor below warning threshold
rules.recommendation: Check motor loading and capacitor compensation.

rules.title: Heat stress watch condition
rules.recommendation: Apply hydration/rest cycle and reduce exposure duration.

rules.title: DLQ has undelivered safety messages
rules.recommendation: Inspect failed event payloads and clear consumer errors immediately.
